prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to building safety and housing regulations which fall under the jurisdiction of the UK government. It is relevant to England as it addresses the responsibilities of housing officials and remediation efforts for cladding safety following the Grenfell Tower tragedy.
